name: DWARF MINER
short_description: DWARF MINER A 2D mining adventure where you play as a dwarf digging deep to recover an ancient scroll. Face enemies, upgrade your tools, and uncover hidden treasures. The game saves progress, but the journey gets tougher with each update. Can you survive the depths and uncover all secrets?
detailed_description:
DWARF MINER: The Lost Scroll

ROCK AND STONE, BROTHER! ⚒️💎
Descend into the depths in DWARF MINER: The Lost Scroll, a thrilling 2D mining adventure! Play as a brave dwarf on a mission to recover a legendary ancient scroll hidden far beneath the surface. Dig through layers of rock, uncover hidden treasures, and brave the dangers of the deep!

Upgrade your tools, manage your resources, and face underground foes like skeletons, goblins, and the fearsome DarkDwarf boss.

💥 Features:

🪓 Mining Meets Adventure – Dig, explore, and uncover the secrets hidden below.

⚔️ Enemies & Boss Fights – Battle hostile creatures and powerful underground bosses.

🔧 Upgrade System – Improve your gear to dig faster, defend better, and survive longer.

🪙 Secrets & Relics – Discover ancient artifacts, hidden paths, and mysterious lore.

🎮 Controller Support Notice – Only supports DualShock 4 (PS4) controllers.
⚠️ Steam Input must be disabled.
⚠️ Local co-op requires two physical PS4 controllers to activate.

🕹️ Retro Pixel-Art Style – Classic 2D visuals with a handcrafted, nostalgic vibe.

🌟 Expanding World – New quests, areas, enemies, and story content will be added with weekly updates! The game will grow over time, with deeper lore and more challenges.

Finished the game? You're just getting started.
More content is on the way—new story chapters, quests, and surprises await!
Stay tuned, and prepare to return to the mines.

ROCK AND STONE!! 🪨🔥
